properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 53/15
BARENTS SEA

1. SRV POLAR EMPRESS WILL BE CONDUCTING A SEISMIC SURVEY AT THE FOLLOWING
POSITION:

1 72-19.3N 21-11.7E
2 72-19.2N 20-03.1E
3 73-26.0N 21-48.1E
4 73-25.7N 23-04.7E
5 73-17.9N 23-50.5E
6 73-13.8N 24-05.3E
7 73-32.6N 24-38.9E
8 73-32.1N 24-43.0E
9 73-12.7N 24-09.1E
10 73-05.8N 24-33.1E
11 72-02.5N 22-47.7E
12 72-02.5N 21-12.3E


WITH 14 STREAMER CABLES OF  6000 METERS LONG.
REQUEST WIDE BERTH OF 5NM ASTERN, 2NM AHEAD, AND 2NM ABEAM OF THE VESSEL.

TWO SUPPORT VESSEL IN ATTENDANCE :
SANCO SKY AND  FAXABORG
